_meta.title: Z80 Driver Architecture Reference
_meta.purpose: Authoritative reference for Z80 audio driver development on Mega Drive with SGDK 2.11

memory_map_z80_local.0x0000-0x1FFF: Z80 RAM (8KB — driver code + buffers + tables)
memory_map_z80_local.0x6000: Bank Register (sets which 32KB window of 68K ROM is visible at 0x8000-0xFFFF)
memory_map_z80_local.0x8000-0xFFFF: Banked 68K ROM window (32KB, selected via bank register)

memory_map_68k_view.0xA00000-0xA01FFF: Z80 RAM (read/write when Z80 BUS taken)

Z80_DRIVER_NULL.description: Dummy driver — infinite loop, only sets READY

Z80_DRIVER_PCM.description: Single channel, variable rate 8-32 Khz, 8-bit signed

Z80_DRIVER_XGM.description: XGM v1 music + 4 PCM channels at 14 Khz

Z80_DRIVER_XGM2.description: XGM v2 music + 3 PCM channels at 13.3/6.65 Khz

Z80_DRIVER_CUSTOM.description: Custom Z80 binary loaded via Z80_loadCustomDriver()

command_register.convention: 68K writes command bits, Z80 reads and clears after processing

params_block.description: Driver-specific parameters (sample address, length, rate, etc.)

timing.note: DAC write is fast because it bypasses FM busy flag

dac_enable.effect: Replaces FM channel 6 output with DAC

noise_frequencies.3: Tone generator 3 frequency (allows variable noise pitch)

bank_register.mechanism: Write 9 bits serially (bit 0 of each write, 9 writes total, MSB first)
bank_register.window: 0x8000-0xFFFF on Z80 maps to selected 32KB bank of 68K ROM
bank_register.latency_note: Bank switch is NOT instant — 9 serial writes take ~45 Z80 cycles minimum

bus_contention.description: When 68K accesses Z80 address space (0xA00000-0xA0FFFF), Z80 is halted. When VDP DMA runs, Z80 is also halted.

dma_impact.vblank_dma: Z80 halted for duration of DMA transfer — can be 100+ scanlines worth
dma_impact.hblank_dma: Short Z80 halts per line — causes jitter in sample timing
dma_impact.mitigation_bus_protection: Z80_setBusProtection(true) — Z80 signals safe windows to 68K
dma_impact.mitigation_delay_dma: Z80_setForceDelayDMA(true) — ~3 scanline delay protects PSG access

safe_access_windows.active_display: 68K can access Z80 RAM during active display (no DMA)
safe_access_windows.vblank_before_dma: Brief window at start of VBlank before DMA starts
safe_access_windows.after_dma: After DMA completes, Z80 resumes — may need resync

bus_contention.worst_case_scenario: H-blank DMA + scroll update + sprite DMA + 68K→Z80 param write in same frame = audio dropout
bus_contention.aaa_rule: Bus protection is MANDATORY, not optional, for AAA audio quality

custom_driver_template.description: Minimal structure for a custom Z80 driver compatible with SGDK Z80_loadCustomDriver()
requirements: ORG $0000 (loaded at start of Z80 RAM)
Set IM 1 for V-int support (or keep DI for polling)
Write $80 to STATUS register ($0102) when ready
Main loop: poll COMMAND register ($0100), process commands, clear processed bits
Total size must fit in 8KB minus buffer space
skeleton_z80_asm: JR Z, main_loop      ; no command, loop
